description_long: This lamp features a cylindrical, light-colored lampshade mounted atop a minimalist tripod base. The three slender legs are evenly spaced and extend outward, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The lampshade appears to be made of a matte or fabric material, while the legs are likely constructed from metal, giving the lamp a sleek and contemporary look. The design is simple and functional, with no visible switches or decorative embellishments. The lamp is intended for placement on the floor, making it suitable for living rooms, offices, or urban public spaces. Its neutral color palette and clean lines allow it to blend seamlessly into a variety of environments.
description: A modern floor lamp with a cylindrical shade and three slim metal legs in a tripod arrangement, finished in neutral tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical shade and all three tripod legs symmetrically spaced.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shade and the angled spread of the tripod legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the tripod legs visible and the shade centered.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the angled tripod legs and the cylindrical shade.
